shotList: 1) CU Fountain in front of City Hall in downtown Seoul; zoom back showing traffic moving by in FG; the  fountain is in center of a traffic circle. 2) CU Traffic light; large apartment buildings in BG; traffic moving by in FG in the Square. G-F  3) LA CU Fire escape stairs on side of apartment bldg.; zoom back showing parked cars in FG.  4) MLS Busy intersection with pedestrians moving along in front of shops in BG. VG  5) LA MS Two flags flying from top of City Hall in downtown Seoul, one is Korean flag, the other the flag of the city of Seoul. VG  6) LA MLS City Hall; traffic moving by in BG; large sign over entrance to City Hall. G 7) MCU Entrance to City Hall; civilians and one soldier moving towards entrance. G-F 8) LA MS City Hall building:, zoom in to entrance, showing American service man in fatigues approaching. G-F  9) MLS Korean farm girls separating rice from the chaff; small farm bldgs. in BG. VG  1O) MS Group of Korean farmers separating rice from stalks, using a foot pedal machine; straw roofed bldgs. in direct BG. SV DA 11) MCU Group of farmers standing behind the machine, holding the stalks of  grain over drum, knocking rice from stalks.  12) ECU Revolving drum. G 13) CU Face of the young farmer.  14) MS Two farmers using bamboo rakes, raking up the chaff from the ground. 15) CU Grains of rice on the ground.  16) LA CU Face of one of the farmers wearing a straw hat; PAN R to faces of others. 17) MS Korean farm family threshing rice stalks. SV DA  18) MCU Elderly Korean woman with a baby strapped to her back, using bamboo rake to rake over the rice stalk on the ground.  19) CU Woman using a pole to thresh the rice stalks on ground; woman with baby strapped to her back moves in from R. VG  20) CU Rice straw on ground being beaten to separate rice from stalks.  G 21) CU Face of young farmer as he works with rice, using a thin pole with straps attached to end.  22) MS Elderly farmer sitting on a straw mat bundling stalks together after they have been threshd.V  23) ECU Elderly man sitting on ground working with stalk 24) CU Side view of head of a cow chewing her cud. G-F  25) MS Two farmers loading rice stalks onto an ox cart alongside of road.  26) CU Ox cart  containing the stalks, one man up on the cart, the other man on ground tossing up the bundles; farm bldgs. in BG.  27) MS Young man picking up stalks of rice and tossing them onto ox cart.  28) CU Front view, ox hitched to cart. VG  29) MCU Front view, ox and cart; two men loading the rice stalks. VG  3O) MLS Ox cart parked on side of road being loaded; children standing by looking on; cart moving down road, leaving scene off to L. G SV DA VG
title: STOCK FOOTAGE OF KOREA Seoul, Korea
